executive_summary: Build failure detected in repository loginkarun/scib_demo on branch main (attempt 3). The primary issue is a CONFIGURATION_ERROR where the GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) is not found or not accessible, resulting in HTTP 404 errors when attempting to dispatch the workflow. This prevents any Maven build from executing.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates that the .github/workflows/build.yml file does not exist in the repository or the GitHub token lacks the necessary permissions to access it.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml is missing from the repository at the specified branch (main), or the GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) used for authentication does not have the required 'workflow' or 'actions' scope permissions to dispatch workflows.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No Maven builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation, testing, and deployment processes.

steps: 1. Create the .github/workflows directory structure if it doesn't exist
2. Add a build.yml workflow file with proper Maven build configuration
3. Ensure the workflow includes workflow_dispatch trigger for manual execution
4. Verify GitHub token has 'workflow' scope enabled
5. Commit and push the workflow file to the main branch

errors.title: GitHub Token Permission Insufficient
errors.description: The GitHub Personal Access Token may lack the necessary 'workflow' or 'actions' permissions required to dispatch GitHub Actions workflows programmatically.
errors.error_message: Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled.
errors.root_cause: The PAT token used for API calls may have been created without the 'workflow' scope, which is required to trigger workflow_dispatch events via the GitHub REST API.
errors.impact: Unable to programmatically trigger builds via API. Manual workflow triggers from GitHub UI may still work, but automated CI/CD pipelines are blocked.

steps: 1. Navigate to GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens
2. Regenerate or create a new token with 'workflow' scope enabled
3. Update the token in the automation system/environment variables
4. Test the workflow dispatch API call with the new token

errors.title: GitHub Actions Potentially Disabled
errors.description: GitHub Actions may be disabled at the repository or organization level, preventing any workflows from being executed.
errors.error_message: Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled.
errors.root_cause: Repository or organization settings may have GitHub Actions disabled, either intentionally or due to billing/quota restrictions.
errors.impact: No workflows can run until Actions are re-enabled. This affects all automation, testing, and deployment processes.

steps: 1. Navigate to Repository Settings > Actions > General
2. Ensure 'Allow all actions and reusable workflows' is selected
3. Check organization-level Actions settings if applicable
4. Verify billing/quota limits are not exceeded

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Error classification completed for build attempt 3. No Maven build logs available due to workflow dispatch failure. Root cause identified as missing workflow configuration file.
compliance_notes.remediation_priority: CRITICAL - Must resolve before any builds can execute
compliance_notes.security_considerations: Verify GitHub token permissions follow principle of least privilege. Ensure workflow file contains no hardcoded secrets.
next_steps: Verify GitHub token has workflow scope

remediation_scripts.purpose: Create missing .github/workflows/build.yml file with standard Maven build configuration
Guide for updating GitHub token with proper workflow permissions
